data.title: CPI Inflation In Line As Rent Slows, Energy Heats Up; S&P 500 Falls
data.description: Inflation could have been moving closer to its target if it weren't for the conflict in Iran. The latest Consumer Price Index shows that inflation is in line with expectations, with a slowdown in rent prices balancing out rising energy costs. The S&P 500 experienced a decline following this news.

data.title: Jobs Report: Payrolls Dive In Shock To S&P 500, The Fed And Trump
data.description: In February, there was an unexpected drop of 92,000 jobs according to the latest report. This caused S&P 500 futures to increase their losses. The Federal Reserve now faces a challenging situation as a result. The post-Jobs Report highlights the significant impact on not just the stock market but also on the Fed and the Trump administration.

data.title: Fed's Key Inflation Rate Hot; GDP Growth Tumbles (Live Coverage)
data.description: The chances of a rate cut are decreasing as the Federal Reserve's important inflation rate rises while GDP growth drops. This update was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: AI Jobs Disruption Is Here. What It Means For The S&P 500 And You.
data.description: Numerous businesses are currently implementing staff freezes or layoffs in anticipation of significant productivity enhancements driven by artificial intelligence. This trend highlights the current disruption in job roles caused by AI integration. The implications of this shift are significant for both the S&P 500 index and individual employees.

data.title: iSpecimen Is Trending Overnight — Here's Why ISPC Stock Surged 56% In The After-Hours Session
data.description: iSpecimen Inc. (ISPC) witnessed a significant surge in its stock value in after-hours trading, with shares leaping by 56.19% to $0.20. The Massachusetts-based biospecimen marketplace unveiled a new direct shipping strategy, reducing domestic transit times by 70–85%. By eliminating centralized hub routing, deliveries that previously took 7–14 days now arrive in just 1–2 days. This restructuring not only accelerates delivery but also lowers shipping costs by minimizing handoffs. Furthermore, iSpecimen expanded its rare specimen sourcing partnerships in Europe and Eastern Europe, aiming to acquire unique specimens for urgent research requirements. data.description: In Bangkok, the inaugural Grand Nikko Bangkok Sathorn will open its doors on April 10, 2026, becoming the premier Grand Nikko establishment in Thailand.

data.title: Rockefeller Foundation Calls for Urgent, Coordinated Response to Record Decline in Global Aid, per new OECD Data
data.description: New preliminary data from the OECD for the year 2025 indicates a significant 23% reduction in global official development assistance (ODA) compared to 2024, marking a historic decline. According to projections by ISGlobal research and The Lancet Global Health, this sharp decrease in ODA could potentially result in 9.4 million or more preventable deaths by the year 2030. The Rockefeller Foundation is also involved in initiatives addressing this concerning trend.

data.title: OKX Ventures and HashKey support VPBank-linked CAEX in Vietnam's crypto pilot amidst stringent regulations. #Investment #Cryptocurrency
data.description: Two prominent investment firms, OKX Ventures and HashKey, are acquiring a stake in CAEX, an exchange backed by VPBank. This move comes amid Vietnam's implementation of strict regulations on crypto assets, forcing offshore exchanges to meet stringent requirements to operate onshore. As a result, CAEX is poised to benefit from this development, positioning itself favorably within the emerging onshore licensing regime in Vietnam.
